hero.badge: Booking Systems • Web Apps • Conversion Focus
hero.title: I design and build booking-focused digital products that convert visitors into paying clients.
hero.subtitle: For transport and service businesses: from discovery and UX to production launch, with stable architecture and measurable business outcomes.
hero.trustTitle: Trusted by operations teams and growing companies

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Senior full-stack partner for booking and conversion-oriented web products.
about.story: I help companies turn fragmented booking processes into scalable digital products. My work combines product thinking, clean architecture, and conversion-focused UX. I usually lead delivery end-to-end: discovery, implementation, optimization, and post-launch support.
highlights: Business-first approach: every technical decision supports revenue or operational efficiency.
Fast iteration loops with transparent communication and async collaboration.
Production-ready code: performance, SEO, stability, and maintainability by default.
Strong domain experience in transport, reservations, and payments.

credibility.label: Projects launched in real client environments
Passenger operations supported by booking systems

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Focused service lines for companies that need speed, stability, and measurable outcomes.

booking.title: Booking Systems
booking.description: From seat inventory and schedules to payment flows and confirmations. Built to reduce manual operations and increase completed reservations.

webapps.title: Web Apps
webapps.description: Custom web products for internal teams and customer portals with clean UX, scalable architecture, and maintainable codebases.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.description: Cross-platform mobile apps that reuse core logic and deliver reliable booking and account flows on iOS and Android.

wordpress.title: WordPress & Performance
wordpress.description: High-quality WordPress implementations with custom themes, speed optimization, SEO structure, and conversion-focused pages.
wordpress.tags: Custom themes, Core Web Vitals, SEO

services.expertiseText: Infrastructure, CI/CD, caching, and deployment pipelines are integrated when needed to ensure reliability and smooth releases.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Each project is presented as a business case: problem, solution, stack, and impact.
projects.viewAllHint: Want deeper technical and business breakdowns?

bozic-konig.title: Bozic Konig – Online Reservations
bozic-konig.problem: The booking process needed faster route search and a cleaner purchase flow.
bozic-konig.solution: Built a React/Next experience integrated with back-office data for routes, departures, and prices.
bozic-konig.outcome: Outcome: streamlined booking journey with X% potential conversion uplift.

sti-web.title: Serbia Tours – Ticket Sales Platform
sti-web.problem: Needed a robust public booking experience connected to core business operations.
sti-web.solution: Implemented a WordPress frontend backed by Laravel APIs for departures, pricing, reservations, and payments.
sti-web.outcome: Outcome: platform supports high-volume yearly passenger operations (150k+ ecosystem context).

sti-mobile.title: Serbia Tours – Mobile App
sti-mobile.problem: Customers needed a mobile-native way to search and manage reservations.
sti-mobile.solution: Developed a React Native app with shared business logic, profile flows, and booking search.
sti-mobile.outcome: Outcome: improved mobile booking accessibility with X+ recurring app users.

drivesoft-backoffice.title: DriveSoft – Back-office
drivesoft-backoffice.problem: Operations needed centralized visibility over passengers, routes, and reports.
drivesoft-backoffice.solution: Delivered a Laravel back-office with RBAC, data workflows, imports/exports, and operational reporting.
drivesoft-backoffice.outcome: Outcome: reduced manual operational handling and improved reporting consistency.

drivesoft-demo.title: DriveSoft – Demo Reservations
drivesoft-demo.problem: Sales and stakeholders needed a clear demo flow before production integrations.
drivesoft-demo.solution: Built a React demo with realistic search filters and a multi-step reservation experience.
drivesoft-demo.outcome: Outcome: faster client demos and clearer pre-sales technical validation.

prostor-dereta.title: Prostor Miljenko Dereta – WordPress
prostor-dereta.problem: Organization required a faster, SEO-ready site with manageable content workflows.
prostor-dereta.solution: Implemented a custom WordPress build with booking forms, optimized assets, and editorial flexibility.
prostor-dereta.outcome: Outcome: improved content velocity and stronger SEO baseline for ongoing growth.
